data.title: :tada: WP Discourse now has logs and tests
data.text: We're very excited to announce a new feature in v2.2.5 of WP Discourse plugin: Logs! Logging may sound a bit boring, but I've been excited about this update for months :sweat_smile: . You can check out the details here https://meta.discourse.org/t/wp-discourse-logging/190745 View logs for the WP ...
data.author: angus

data.title: Extract code from Text gpt response
data.text: Yeah good catch on the corner cases. Forgetting inline for a second, both solutions actually have bugs. The regex version fails with extra '```' in the code. The loop version fails if there are multiple code blocks. For example: parseCode is the regex impl parseCode2 is the loop impl const testOn...
